# typing-practice.online

> A free online typing test and practice platform to improve WPM typing speed.

## Pages
- [Home](https://typing-practice.online/): Main typing test and homepage
- [Typing Test](https://typing-practice.online/typing-test): Take a timed WPM test
- [Lessons](https://typing-practice.online/lessons): Typing lessons for beginners
- [About](https://typing-practice.online/about): About this platform

## Description
typing-practice.online is a free tool for anyone looking to improve their 
typing speed and accuracy. It offers timed typing tests, WPM tracking, 
and practice lessons for all skill levels.
